items.title: If you have recessed lights, check out these stretchable Matter bulbs with a design, now $15 each
items.summary:
Linkind Matter-Certified Stretchable Recessed Smart Bulbs (2-pack)

Buy for $30 (Reg. $40)

What we love

About 10 years ago I lived in a home with recessed lighting, and if I was still there, this sort of bulb would be on my list. Since they are stretchable, you can let more light out, which is really useful if you ask me. Matter certification means these will work with all the major players like Apple, Google, Alexa, and others.

items.title: Upgrade your standing desk experience with this drafting chair while it’s $90 (Save 29%)
items.summary:
Marsail Ergonomic Standing Desk Drafting Chair

Buy for $90 (Reg. $126)

What we love

If you’ve got a standing desk, a drafting chair can nicely bridge the gap when the surface is high or low. Several years back I used a drafting chair like this for the same reason and now these are finally being marketed that way.

items.title: Friday Apple TV deals from $1: Just about every Spider-Man movie and bundle now on sale, La La Land, and more
items.summary: Friday’s lineup of the best Apple TV deals is now ready to roll, including loads of your friendly neighborhood Spider-Man action: The Amazing Spider-Man Double Feature, Spider-Man Trilogy, Spider-Man 8-Film Collection, Spider-Man 3-Movie Collection, Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse, Spider-Man 3, The Amazing Spider-Man 2, and a whole bunch more. The Apple TV deals await below.

items.title: Retractable USB-C cable headlines this 8-in-1 surge protector, now $18
items.summary:
TESSAN 8-in-1 Retractable USB-C Surge Protector

Buy for $18 (Reg. $21)

What we love

I probably don’t really need to call it out, but I will anyways. This surge protector sets itself apart with a retractable USB-C cable. This feature is right up my alley, allowing me to ditch the need for a separate cable in one more place. It also packs 4 AC outlets, dual USB-A, and one Type-C port.

items.title: This powerful 175W USB-C car charger just fell to $20 Prime shipped
items.summary:
JOYROOM 175W 3-Port USB-C Car Charger

Buy for $20 (Reg. $25)

What we love

It doesn’t matter if you frequently find yourself on the road, or simply want to have a backup plan for that one time you’ll need a lot of USB-C power in the car. This unit can handle smartphones, tablets, laptops, and more, with 100W, 45W, and 30W charging ports in tow.

There are some notable “Doorcrasher” deals available if you get in there quickly (limited stock) that deliver a solid 50% off everything from its light-up Pegboard Desk Dock through to the Block Combo XL Smarter Kit, and the PC Screen Mirror Lightstrip, but that’s just for starters.

items.title: Score a $144 off-season deal on EGO’s 56V 12-inch cordless electric snow shovel + 2.5Ah battery at a $265 2026 low
items.summary: Over at Amazon, we just spotted an off-season deal for the EGO Power+ 56V 12-inch Cordless Electric Snow Shovel with 2.5Ah battery at $265 shipped. Down from $409, this model has mostly been keeping to $379 since March, until a few days ago when we began seeing it bounce between $409 and $265, with the sporadic deal returning again today. You’ll be getting a $144 markdown here that even beats out its Black Friday 2025 pricing by $5, landing it at the best price we have tracked in 2026. Based on the way the price keeps fluctuating lately, if the deal disappears, be sure to check back in a day or two to see if it reappears.

items.summary:
Stouchi Intel-Certified Thunderbolt 5 Cable

Buy for $23 (Reg. $31.50)

What we love

We feature affordable cables around here all the time, but you generally have to step down to at least USB4/Thunderbolt 4 data transfers, if not abysmally slow 60/100W solutions with USB 2.0 data transfer speeds. This solution has no major sacrifices with Thunderbolt 5 support, 240W charging, a braided design, and more.

items.title: Lectric’s Christmas in July Sale offers up to $733 FREE bundle savings + $100 price cuts on e-bikes starting from $799
items.summary: Lectric has switched to a higher gear with its newly launched Christmas in July Sale that is offering up to $733 savings and select $100 price cuts on e-bikes, as well as 30% off extra batteries. It’s a great opportunity to prep for upcoming events like heading off to school, with a top choice for students being the lightweight XP Lite2 Long-Range Folding Commuter e-bike with a FREE $429 bundle at $999 shipped, or its upgraded JW belt-drive counterpart with the same bundle at $1,099 shipped. These bundles are where the main savings are typically during a Lectric sale, which would cost you $1,428 or $1,528 for these models were that not the case. Aside from the $449 bundles we saw them getting back in February for Presidents’ Day, these are the biggest collections of gear we’ve seen on these in 2026, even beating the $346 Prime Day bundle deals. If you don’t care about the bundled gear, you can find the standard XP Lite2 e-bikes for $799 shipped, while the standard XP Lite2 JW Black Belt Drive model goes for $899 shipped. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.

items.title: This compact 70W charger powers your laptop, phone, and more for just $20 today (All-time low)
items.summary:
Baseus Enerfill 70W 3-port USB-C charger

Buy for $20 (Reg. $40)

Apply I36KLX8D during checkout. Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

Baseus’ Enerfill 70W charger is a compact, travel-friendly option that can power a laptop, phone, and smaller accessories from a single wall outlet. It features two USB-C ports alongside a USB-A connection and delivers enough power for a MacBook Air or a similarly specced notebook. Foldable prongs also help keep the charger compact and easy to pack into a bag.
